heading: Continue Learning
body:
Follow along with this video to learn how to understand, iterate, and
improve your MongoDB Search results using [explain](explain-ref) and
[score details](fts-score-details).

*Duration: 5 Minutes*

[https://youtu.be/KPrunyBrehcgst](https://youtu.be/KPrunyBrehcgst)

The complexity level of MongoDB Search queries and the type of [operators](fts-operators) used can affect database performance for the node
that `mongot` runs on.

Highly complex queries, such as queries with multiple clauses that use
the [compound](compound-ref) operator, or queries which use
the [regex](regex-ref) (regular expression) or the [wildcard](wildcard-ref)
operator, are resource-intensive.
